prompt: Create a 20 mm square verification block that is 60 mm tall. Add a 5 mm diameter transverse through hole through the middle of the block. Add a 5 mm diameter blind hole from the top face with a 10 mm diameter counterbore on top. Use a 10 mm blind-hole depth and a 5 mm counterbore depth.

normalized_spec.intent_summary: A verification block with a transverse through hole and a counterbored blind hole.
required_features: Counterbore on the top blind hole
assumptions: Use the default verification-block proportions from the deterministic reference.
